Container.Name: skiptro
Container.Overview: Automatic TV show intro and credits detection using audio fingerprinting. Scans your media library and generates skip markers that Kodi (via service.skiptro) can use to auto-skip intros during playback.
Container.Changes:
[center][b]Skiptro Change Log[/b][/center]
[b]v0.16.0[/b]
[u]Desktop[/u] - Redesigned Export page. Browse and select shows/seasons to export, same as Media page - Custom Export and Export All in status bar - Export format settings moved to Settings page and saved between sessions - Export status pills on each season and show (e.g. "JSON ✓", "EDL 5/7") - Status bar now shows contextual buttons per page - Library structure cached for faster show/season counts in Custom Scan - Drive verification on checkbox click with loading spinner - Fixed UI freezing and memory pressure during long scans - Removed Dry Run from Desktop (still available in CLI) - Crash logging to logs/crash.log
[b]v0.15.1[/b]
[u]Desktop GUI[/u] - Fix UI freezing during long scans. Throttled progress updates, async DB queries - Scanned shows with no intros now show "No intros found" instead of "Not scanned" - Rescan button shown for previously scanned shows
[u]Detection[/u] - Detect intros on shows where fewer than 50% of episodes fingerprint-match (Everybody Loves Raymond) - Drop false positives from template fallback when duration doesn't match the cluster
[b]v0.15.0[/b]
[u]Desktop GUI[/u] - Redesigned Libraries page as "Media". Browse shows and seasons per library with scan/rescan at every level - Persistent status bar with expandable log panel visible from any page - Custom Scan mode with cascading multi-level selection (group, library, show, season) - Dry run mode in Custom Scan. Test scans without saving to database, with amber info banner - Audio stream detection. Inline warning on seasons with multiple audio tracks, stream picker to select track - Export format options: JSON, chapters, EDL, and theme MP3 - Theme export options: configurable filename prefix and overwrite toggle - Collapsible groups with nested modular templates - Merged Stats and Intros pages. Searchable per-show breakdown with episode-level DataGrid - Removed redundant Scan page - Window size and position persisted across sessions - Removed user-facing detection tuning (calibrated defaults used automatically) - Reset database option in Settings with double confirmation
[u]CLI[/u] - New `streams` command to list and manage multi-track audio seasons - Audio stream override per season (`streams set/clear`) - Multi-track detection notice after scan completion
[u]Detection[/u] - Deprioritize studio bumpers when a longer actual intro exists (Star Trek Starfleet Academy) - Recover episodes with partial fingerprint matches using mel spectrogram similarity - Extend search window from 10 to 15 minutes for shows with late intros - Fix post-intro sound effects included in boundaries on shows with sustained silence (NCIS)

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent data: scan results, library config, and database.

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Path to your TV show library. Must be read-write so skiptro can write .skiptro.json files alongside episodes. Add more paths below if your media is spread across multiple shares.

Config.Name: Media Paths
Config.Description: Container paths to register as media libraries (comma-separated). Must match your volume mount targets above. If you add more path mappings, add the container paths here too.

Config.Name: Scan Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for automatic scans (default: 3 AM daily).
